THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE,KEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DELAY,KEN-SAFE -WAY PEST CONTROL CO. MOT TO VACATE JUDGMENT GRANTED. PLFT DID NOT PROVE THAT DEFT FAILED TO PERFORM TASK, OR THAT DEFT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
